overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of an armored character with a shield walking through a desolate rocky canyon at dusk. The character transitions from a narrow wooden-planked passage under rock overhangs into an open snow-covered mountain landscape with an orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky canyon passage with wooden walkway and overhead beams

agents.ego_description: armored character carrying a round shield walking steadily along wooden planks through a tight rocky canyon

entered.detail: tall dark rock wall forming the left side of the narrow passage
tall dark rock wall forming the right side of the narrow passage
thick horizontal wooden log spanning across the canyon opening overhead
weathered wooden planks forming the elevated path through the canyon
jagged rock formation silhouetted against the orange sky visible through the canyon exit

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a third-person view of an armored character walking through a narrow, enclosed rocky canyon. The path consists of wooden planks elevated between steep rock walls, with a large wooden beam spanning overhead. The orange dusk sky is visible in the distance through the canyon opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone where canyon begins to widen

events.description: character passes under the final overhead wooden beam as the canyon opens up ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon walls recede and the path opens toward the mountain landscape

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the wooden planks as the canyon gradually widens. The overhead wooden beam passes out of view behind, and the rock walls move to the mid-distance while the open landscape ahead becomes more prominent against the orange sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain pass with snow-covered ground

events.description: ground surface changes from wooden planks to snow-covered dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking through open terrain with snow-covered ground and sparse vegetation

entered.detail: grayish snow or ash-covered ground replacing the wooden walkway
clumps of dry grass and small shrubs dotting the snowy landscape
distant jagged rock formations on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the canyon onto an open mountain path covered in snow or ash. The wooden planks end and give way to a natural trail surrounded by sparse dry vegetation and distant rock formations under the expansive orange dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as an armored character transitions from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into a vast, open mountain landscape under a dusk sky. It begins with the character walking along elevated wooden planks enclosed by steep rock walls and a heavy overhead beam, with a glimpse of orange light in the distance. As the character advances, the canyon gradually widens and the overhead beam recedes, allowing the rock walls to shift toward the mid-distance while the horizon expands. The scene then opens completely as the character emerges from the canyon, with the wooden path giving way to a natural trail covered in snow or ash. Finally, the camera reveals a wide mountain expanse filled with sparse dry vegetation and distant rock formations beneath an expansive orange sky.
